hero.slide1Sub: Modern fields, practical experience, and up to 2,000,000 UZS monthly scholarship at Topex Texnikumi.
hero.slide2Sub: Special programs for grades 10-11 with professional tracks and international standards.
hero.slide3Sub: 3+ branches, 50+ professional teachers, 600+ students — your future career starts here.
hero.note: For 9th grade graduates and those who did not complete 11-year education!

about.label: Why us
about.title: About the College
about.slogan: Topex Texnikumi — Quality Education, Real Results!
about.paragraph: Topex College is a modern private college operating in Chilanzar district of Tashkent since 2022. We provide high-quality education, professional fields, and olympiad preparation for over 600 students in grades 10-11. Experienced teachers, modern classrooms, and an individual approach help unlock every student's potential.

team.label: Our specialists
team.title: Meet our team
team.paragraph: Topex College employs over 50 professional teachers and practicing specialists. Most of them have years of experience in their fields: IT, marketing, banking, graphics, and other modern directions. Our teachers provide not only theoretical knowledge but also real work experience and career advice.

diplomaSection.title: State-recognized diploma
diplomaSection.text:
Topex graduates receive a state-recognized diploma — a document confirming practical skills in digital technologies, programming and other fields. This diploma opens doors to employment at leading IT companies and high-tech industries, giving you a competitive edge in the job market.

The Topex program suits participants with any level of prior preparation. Beginners can master a new profession from scratch, while practicing specialists can upgrade their digital skills and change direction.

narxPage.heroSubtitle: Payment terms, grants and discounts for all programs at Topex Texnikum
narxPage.mainSubtitle: Tuition is the same for all programs. You can choose a convenient payment option
narxPage.grantFundDesc: Grant fund. For SAT 1200+, IELTS 7.0+, C1 certificate holders and olympiad winners
narxPage.grantDiscountDesc: For quarterly payment. If you pay 3 months at once
narxPage.grant100Desc: For olympiad winners and low-income families
narxPage.directionsSubtitle: Tuition is the same for all 8 programs — 2 500 000 UZS/month
narxPage.ctaSubtitle: Leave a request — we will contact you and answer all your questions
narxPage.faq1q: Is tuition the same for all programs?
narxPage.faq1a: Yes, tuition is the same for all 8 programs — 2 500 000 UZS per month.
narxPage.faq2q: What are the requirements for a grant?
narxPage.faq2a: You need SAT 1200+, IELTS 7.0+, a C1 certificate, or to be a subject olympiad winner. Separate grants are available for low-income families.
narxPage.faq3a: Yes, you can pay with any card (UzCard, HUMO, VISA, MasterCard). Cash payment is also available.
narxPage.faq4a: Yes, in certain cases payment can be deferred. This must be agreed with the administration.

vakansiyaPage.heroSubtitle: Want to work with the professional team at Topex Texnikum? We are always looking for talented specialists
vakansiyaPage.emptyTitle: There are no open vacancies at the moment
vakansiyaPage.emptyText: We are always looking for qualified teachers and specialists. As soon as new vacancies appear, we will announce them here. Send your resume — we will contact you!
vakansiyaPage.resumeText: Send your resume via the contacts below. As soon as a suitable vacancy appears, we will contact you right away.

imtihonPage.heroSubtitle: The 2026 admission exam results for Topex Texnikum will be published on this page in the coming days
imtihonPage.bannerText: As soon as the results are announced, we will notify you by SMS and phone
imtihonPage.processSubtitle: Admission to Topex Texnikum consists of the following stages
imtihonPage.stage1Desc: Apply online or in person at the college. Provide your name, phone number and chosen program.
imtihonPage.stage2Desc: Come to the college on the appointed date. The exam is held in Uzbek or Russian and covers mathematics and native language.
imtihonPage.stage3Desc: Exam results are announced within 3 business days on this page and by phone.
imtihonPage.stage4Desc: Successful students are enrolled and a contract is signed. Grants are applied immediately.
